2026-04-08T18:36:14.2183137Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T18:36:14.2184711Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T18:36:14.2185138Z 
2026-04-08T18:36:14.2185320Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T18:36:14.2185624Z
